subcodes.first_line: O ye companions of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! His honor Samíʻ Zabíḥ hath offered high praise and commendation of those faithful friends who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء جناب سمی ذبیح نهایت مدح و ثنا از آن یاران باوفا نمایند که
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
